titles.title: Restoring the Secondary Trading Market Act
Restoring the Secondary Trading Market Act
Restoring the Secondary Trading Market Act

To amend the Securities Act of 1933 to exempt off-exchange secondary trading from State regulation where such trading is with respect to securities of an issuer that makes publicly available certain current information, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported by the Yeas and Nays: 26 - 17.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Financial Services. H. Rept. 119-573.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 493.

committee.name: House Financial Services
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
